articles.title: Privacy commissioner to release results of Grok deepfake investigation

articles.title: Most crime guns traced by RCMP came from within Canada, internal reports say
articles.description: OTTAWA — The vast majority of crime guns traced by the RCMP to identifiable sources in 2023 and 2024 came from within Canada and were not smuggled from abroad, say internal reports prepared by the national police force. articles.title: James Webb reveals two completely different twilights on an alien world
articles.description: JWST has revealed dramatic differences between the dawn and dusk regions of the scorching exoplanet WASP-121 b.
